emittedEvidence.query: Heaven's Door Bootleg Series Vol 3 official whiskey bourbon
emittedEvidence.summary:
**Heaven’s Door Bootleg Series Volume III** is an **official Heaven’s Door bourbon release**, specifically the **2021 Bootleg Series bottling**. Heaven’s Door’s official Bootleg Series page lists **Volume III (2021)** as part of the annual series, and the official product page identifies it as a **cask-strength 13-year-old Kentucky bourbon finished in Vino de Naranja casks**. ([heavensdoor.com](https://www.heavensdoor.com/bootleg-series?utm_source=openai))
